inputs.name: bytes
inputs.description: The byte array to convert.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: Optional. The maximum number of bytes to read and convert. If length is not specified, the default value for this parameter is the length of the input byte array.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: Optional. The offset into the input byte array from which to start converting. If no value specified, the default value is zero.

outputs.name: stream
outputs.description: An open InputStream created from the contents of the input bytes parameter.

inputs.name: inputStream
inputs.description: Optional. An open InputStream. Note: You can use either inputStream or reader to specify the input object. If both the input parameters are provided, then both the objects will be closed.

inputs.name: reader
inputs.description: Optional. An open reader object.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: The length of the byte array to be created.

outputs.name: bytes
outputs.description: The new byte array.

inputs.name: stream
inputs.description: Optional. The InputStream. Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then both the objects will be marked.

inputs.name: reader
inputs.description: Optional. The reader object.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.description: The maximum number of bytes that can be read before the mark position becomes invalid. If more than this number of bytes are read from the stream after the pub.io:mark service is invoked, the pub.io:reset service will have no effect.

outputs.name: stream
outputs.description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream .

outputs.name: reader
outputs.description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader .

inputs.name: stream
inputs.description: Optional. The InputStream. Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then the stream input parameter is ignored.

inputs.name: reader
inputs.description: Optional. The reader object.

outputs.name: stream
outputs.description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream .

outputs.name: supported
outputs.description: Indicates whether the stream supports the mark and reset operations. A value of: true indicates that the InputStream supports the mark and reset operations. false indicates that the InputStream does not support the mark and reset operations.

outputs.name: reader
outputs.description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader .

inputs.name: stream
inputs.description: The InputStream. Object from which the service is to read bytes.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: Optional The offset into the byte array in the buffer to which the data is written. If no value is supplied, this defaults to 0.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: Optional. The maximum number of bytes to read from the InputStream. If no value is supplied, the default is the length of buffer . If the value supplied for length is greater than the length of buffer , an exception will be thrown.

inputs.name: buffer
inputs.description: The buffer into which data is written. This is a byte array, which can be created from a Flow service by invoking pub.io:createByteArray .

outputs.name: stream
outputs.description: The InputStream. If any bytes were read from the stream, the stream is repositioned after the last byte read.

outputs.name: buffer
outputs.description: The buffer into which data was written.

outputs.name: bytesRead
outputs.description: The number of bytes read from the InputStream and copied to buffer . If there is no more data because the end of the stream has been reached, bytesRead will be -1.

inputs.name: reader
inputs.description: The reader object.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: The maximum number of characters to read from the input reader object.

outputs.name: reader
outputs.description: The reader object.

outputs.name: lengthRead
outputs.description: The number of characters read from the input reader object. If there is no more data because the end of the stream has been reached, lengthRead will be -1.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: The data read from the reader object, or null if end of stream has been reached.

inputs.name: reader
inputs.description: The reader object.

outputs.name: string
outputs.description: Data read from the reader object.

inputs.name: stream
inputs.description: Optional. The InputStream. Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then both the objects will be reset.

inputs.name: reader
inputs.description: Optional. The reader object.

outputs.name: stream
outputs.description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream .

outputs.name: reader
outputs.description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader .

inputs.name: stream
inputs.description: Optional. The InputStream. Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then the stream and reader object data will be skipped.

inputs.name: reader
inputs.description: Optional. The reader object.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: The number of bytes or characters to skip.

outputs.name: stream
outputs.description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream .

outputs.name: reader
outputs.description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader .

outputs.name: bytesSkipped
outputs.description: Conditional. The actual number of bytes that were skipped. Returned only if the input parameter is stream .

outputs.name: charactersSkipped
outputs.description: Conditional. The number of characters that were skipped. Returned only if the input parameter is reader .

inputs.name: stream
inputs.description: The InputStream that you want to convert.

outputs.name: bytes
outputs.description: The bytes read from stream .

inputs.name: inputStream
inputs.description: The InputStream to convert to a reader object.

inputs.name: encoding
inputs.description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set (for example, ISO-8859-1). If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect , the default operating system encoding is used.

outputs.name: reader
outputs.description: The reader object read from inputStream .

inputs.name: inputStream
inputs.description: The InputStream to convert to a string.

inputs.name: encoding
inputs.description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set (for example, ISO-8859-1). If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect , the default operating system encoding is used.

outputs.name: string
outputs.description: Data read from inputStream and converted to a string.

inputs.name: string
inputs.description: The string to convert to a StringReader object.

outputs.name: reader
outputs.description: The StringReader object.

inputs.name: string
inputs.description: The string object to be converted.

inputs.name: encoding
inputs.description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set (for example, ISO-8859-1). If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect , the default operating system encoding is used.

outputs.name: inputStream
outputs.description: An open InputStream created from the contents of string .
